evals.prompt: /quickdeploy this repo; it has a pnpm frontend and backend under apps/
evals.expected_output: Detect multiple deployable services and ask whether to deploy two apps, combine, or choose one.

evals.prompt: deploy this docker compose app to QuickStack; it has a private image and an env file
evals.expected_output: Produce a Compose import plan that treats registry credentials and API_TOKEN as secrets and asks before deploy.
Translate safe Deployment/Service intent and reject the unsafe ClusterRole rather than raw-applying manifests.

evals.prompt: package this static site for QuickDeploy upload
evals.expected_output: Create an uncompressed tar with a sha256 hash and no forbidden secret files or symlinks.
